name: Psychic Megacyber
name_jp: サイコ・ギガサイバー
desc: If your opponent controls more Spells/Traps than you do, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Psychic Megacyber" once per turn this way. When this card declares an attack on an opponent's Effect Monster while you control "Jinzo": You can Tribute this card; place that opponent's monster face-up in their Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Trap. You can only use this effect of "Psychic Megacyber" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If your opponent controls more Spells/Traps than you do, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Psychic Megacyber" once per turn this way. When this card declares an attack on an opponent's Effect Monster while you control "Jinzo": You can Tribute this card; place that opponent's monster face-up in their Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Trap. You can only use this effect of "Psychic Megacyber" once per turn.
eff: If your opponent controls more Spells/Traps than you do, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Psychic Megacyber" once per turn this way. When this card declares an attack on an opponent's Effect Monster while you control "Jinzo": You can Tribute this card; place that opponent's monster face-up in their Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Trap. You can only use this effect of "Psychic Megacyber" once per turn.

action: Places cards from the opponent's field in the opponent's Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Treats monsters as Continuous Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
